name: CACI International Inc
description: CACI International Inc is a global provider of expertise and technology to government enterprise and mission customers. The company delivers distinctive expertise and technology to help its customers modernize, optimize, and sustain their enterprise and mission-critical operations. CACI provides solutions in areas such as digital modernization, mission technology, and engineering services, primarily serving the U.S. Department of Defense, the intelligence community, and other federal civilian agencies. With a focus on innovation and operational excellence, CACI supports national security and government transformation through advanced analytics, cybersecurity, and specialized mission support.
